title: Basic Meeting Agenda Planner
scenario: Create a meeting agenda template for a team planning session. The agenda should include a header with the meeting title and date, a list of agenda items, and space for notes. The output should be a formatted text string. Keep the agenda simple and concise, with a maximum of 3 agenda items.
constraints: Use a standard professional font and headings

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the agenda meets the specified constraints.
Verify that the agenda items are relevant and clear.
Assess the overall formatting of the agenda, including headings, spacing, and font choice.
